changes.value: **File:** `kanban-app/ui/src/components/left-nav.tsx:10,23`\n\nSwitch statement maps view kinds (`\"kanban\"`, `\"grid\"`, `\"list\"`, `\"tag\"`, etc.) to Lucide icons. View definitions already have an `icon` property — should use the same dynamic icon lookup as field icons.
left-nav.tsx: hardcoded view kind to icon mapping
